# atlassian_jira_screen_scheme (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud screen scheme.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_screen_scheme" "example" {
  name = "Example Screen Scheme"
  screens = {
    default = atlassian_jira_screen.example.id
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the screen scheme.
- `screens` (Map of String) A map of issue operation names to screen IDs. Valid keys: "default", "create", "view", "edit". The "default" key is required.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the screen scheme.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the screen scheme.
